StudentRegistration.title: StudentRegistration
StudentRegistration.description: Information about a student registration, their details, and their ranked orientation preferences.

dateOfBirth.description: Student date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format

firstYearSpecialty.description: Student specialty from the first year

rankedGroups.description: Ranked array of preferred groups (A, B, C)

userAgent.description: User agent of the student browser

PortalSettings.title: PortalSettings
PortalSettings.description: Orientation portal open/close dates and manual override settings.

endDate.description: ISO end date-time when registrations close

manualClose.description: Flag to manually force-close the registration portal

registrations/{registrationId}.description: Registered engineering orientation preferences for students

settings/{settingId}.description: Global settings for the registration and orientation portal
